description: Site comparison pipeline: 82 RED tests across 8 files using dynamic_import pattern, all failing with 'Failed to load url ... Does the file exist?' as expected
content:
site_comparison_red_phase:
  description: "82 RED tests for site comparison pipeline (Story 4.16b)"
  test_files:
    - src/site-comparison/__tests__/extract-storyblok-content.test.ts (10 tests)
    - src/site-comparison/__tests__/fetch-sitemap.test.ts (13 tests)
    - src/site-comparison/__tests__/match-urls.test.ts (10 tests)
    - src/site-comparison/__tests__/compare-content.test.ts (16 tests)
    - src/site-comparison/__tests__/crawl-live-site.test.ts (8 tests)
    - src/site-comparison/__tests__/report-generator.test.ts (10 tests)
    - src/site-comparison/__tests__/run-comparison.test.ts (5 tests)
    - src/site-comparison/__tests__/cli-compare.test.ts (8 tests)
  pattern: dynamic_import_red_phase (await import('../module.js'))
  all_fail_with: "Failed to load url ../module.js -- Does the file exist?"

description: __tests__ subdirectory pattern for co-located tests works with vitest include src/**/*.test.ts
content:
tests_subdirectory_pattern:
  description: "Tests in __tests__/ subdirectory alongside source modules"
  example: "src/site-comparison/__tests__/extract-storyblok-content.test.ts"
  vitest_include: "src/**/*.test.ts" matches both direct co-located and __tests__/ subdirectory patterns
  when: "Multiple test files for a module domain grouped in subdirectory"

description: Added site-comparison test files to key_files registry
Confirmed vitest in apps/migration discovers __tests__ subdirectory tests via src/**/*.test.ts glob pattern
content:
apps_migration_include:
  patterns:
    - "tests/**/*.test.ts"
    - "src/**/*.test.ts"
  note: "src/**/*.test.ts matches both src/module/file.test.ts and src/module/__tests__/file.test.ts"
